category_sources: source_facts.description says dupseek is an interactive program to find and remove duplicate files.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the upstream project page and best available official documentation surface.
source_facts.source-archive points to the upstream beautylabs.net source tarball, with no dedicated docs path supplied.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty and no official source-control project URL is supplied in source_facts.
source_facts.source-archive is an upstream tarball, not a source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states interactive duplicate file finding and removal.
source_facts.executables lists dupseek as a command-line executable.
